ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-17-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Continued To Oct-17-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Claudia Choy for Juliette Kruse (Personal Representative).

The Court stated that it still needs a petition to close this estate. Ms. Choy stated that the only asset in the estate is a tax refund of $700.00, that the primary purpose of this estate is to receive from the pre-deceased Mother Doris Chan's estate in Contra Costa County, that the Mother owned stock in Hong Kong and that the Hartog firm is taking the lead in the Contra Costa County estate. Status on close of estate is continued to October 17, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for Counsel to file a petition for approval of report on status of administration and request for continued administration. The order to appear is off calendar.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

ORDER OF STATUS HEARING
Off Calendar Oct-03-2018 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Continued To Oct-03-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance was made by any Party, Counsel or Interested Person.

An Order to Appear will be issued to the Attorney to appear on October 3, 2018 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 to explain why she failed to appear, and why a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration has not been filed. Status on close of estate is also continued to that date.

Judge: John K. Stewart. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Feb-06-2017 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR SPOUSAL PROPERTY
Off Calendar Dec-05-2016 Continued To Feb-06-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Juliette Kruse in Propria Persona.

The Court asked Ms. Kruse if she received the examiner's notes and if she will be getting counsel. Ms. Kruse stated that she has counsel for her mother in law's estate and that she is confused. The Court stated that there needs to be written response to the issues and that she needs the assistance of counsel. Ms. Kruse stated that she has a letter from Edward Jones regarding the issues, that it is because there is a signed beneficiary giving the amounts to her, that when the 401(k) was established the planner did not list a successor trustee, that the business died with Mr. Chan, that she has answered the questions 4 times and that she cannot find Tai's ex wife. The Court stated that it needs a supplemental declaration and the Ms. Kruse really needs to get counsel. The Petition for Spousal Property was continued to February 6, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 and the Court stated that it needs full responses to all of the issues raised by the examiner or Ms. Kruse will need counsel.

Judge: Andrew Y.S. Cheng. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Rosado. (Not Reported)
